name: ScreenConnect (ConnectWise Control) – ScreenConnect client installation key
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for 23 Remote Monitoring & Management (RMM) tools documented in the LOLRMM project (lolrmm.io). These tools have legitimate uses but are frequently abused by ransomware operators, APT groups, and tech-support fraud actors for persistent remote access. Each entry maps directly from lolrmm.io/api/rmm_tools.json. Parsed: 65 registry key paths across 23 tools.
description: [ScreenConnect (ConnectWise Control)] ScreenConnect client installation key. GUID is unique per deployment/tenant. Contains server URL, encryption key fingerprint, and client configuration.
forensic_value: Server URL value reveals the attacker's ScreenConnect server instance (e.g., attacker-controlled instance.screenconnect.com); GUID ties the client to a specific threat actor tenant
